youtube_metadata.description: Mind-bending scientific paradoxes and psychological illusions designed to question reality. #shorts #paradox

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: universe time dilation clock speed tick
fallback_facts.text_block: If you travel at the <yellow>speed of light</yellow>, time stops completely. To a photon, the moment it was created and the moment it hits your eye happen <red>at the exact same instant.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Time Does Not Exist

fallback_facts.text_block: According to quantum mechanics, a particle can exist in <yellow>multiple places at once.</yellow> It only decides where to be when someone <red>actively looks at it.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Quantum Reality Check
